CVE-2021-40516.title: WeeChat before 3.2.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of ...
CVE-2021-40516.description: WeeChat before 3.2.1 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via a crafted WebSocket frame that trigger an out-of-bounds read in plugins/relay/relay-websocket.c in the Relay plugin.

CVE-2022-28352.title: WeeChat (aka Wee Enhanced Environment for Chat) 3.2 to 3.4 before ...
CVE-2022-28352.description: WeeChat (aka Wee Enhanced Environment for Chat) 3.2 to 3.4 before 3.4.1 does not properly verify the TLS certificate of the server, after certain GnuTLS options are changed, which allows man-in-the-middle attackers to spoof a TLS chat server via an arbitrary certificate. NOTE: this only affects situations where weechat.network.gnutls_ca_system or weechat.network.gnutls_ca_user is changed without a WeeChat restart.

CVE-2024-46613.title: WeeChat before 4.4.2 has an integer overflow and resultant buffer ...
CVE-2024-46613.description: WeeChat before 4.4.2 has an integer overflow and resultant buffer overflow at core/core-string.c when there are more than two billion items in a list. This affects string_free_split_shared , string_free_split, string_free_split_command, and string_free_split_tags.
